summaries.summary: Identifies moDC_2 as an intermediate maturation state of monocyte-derived dendritic cells in adult human skin, positioned along the mo-DC differentiation trajectory between moDC_1 and the terminally mature moDC_3.

Establishes monocyte origin of CD14+ dermal cells. Demonstrates that human dermal CD14+ cells are monocyte-derived and phenotypically distinct from bona fide DCs, providing context for the moDC lineage in skin.
Integrates adult skin dataset from Reynolds et al. (2021) including moDC annotations for cross-developmental comparison with prenatal skin.
